project_identity.name: BuildContextMemory
project_identity.description: A lightweight system that preserves project memory and AI behavior consistency across sessions and tools.
project_identity.architecture_summary: Two-file system: AI_Starter.md defines AI behavior; Build-Context-Memory.json stores append-only project/session memory.

sessions.last_session_summary: Project initialized with base AI starter and memory files.
changes_made: Created initial AI starter instruction file

file_module_map.purpose: Defines mandatory behavior and workflow for AI agents
Stores persistent project identity and session history

decisions_log.reason: Preserves historical decisions and prevents accidental context loss

file_module_map.purpose: SQLite-backed memory manager with local vector fallback

decisions_log.reason: Python 3.13 compatibility required wheel-based packages instead of source builds that were stalling installation.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Keep strict pins; downgrade Python; keep chromadb and build from source

sessions.last_session_summary: Added an authenticated-free ingest path that anonymizes user and item tokens before persisting signals through MemoryManager.

file_module_map.purpose: FastAPI app with health and ingest endpoints plus privacy abstraction
SQLite-backed memory manager receiving anonymized signals

decisions_log.decision: Use deterministic hashing for privacy abstraction
decisions_log.reason: Keeps demo behavior stable while avoiding raw token storage in the memory layer.
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Store raw identifiers; use random UUIDs per request; defer privacy handling to later stage

next_steps: Expand privacy abstraction for additional sensitive fields
sessions.notes: MemoryManager is now reachable from the API and ingest payloads are sanitized before persistence.
